info.name: HMS - Admin Services API Collection
info.description: Dedicated API collection for the Admin Service of HMS, including authentication, dashboard analytics, settings, staff management, leave approvals, wards, beds, and compliance logs.

item.name: 1. Authentication
item.description: Core authentication endpoints, including standard login, challenge handling, token refresh, profile loading, and logout.

exec: console.log("Access and Refresh tokens set in globals.");
console.log("Access and Refresh tokens set from challenge completion.");
console.log("Cleaned up local tokens on logout.");

item.name: 2. Login by Role
item.description: Preconfigured login requests for multiple users per role (Doctors, Nurses, Receptionists, Admins) using database seed credentials.

item.name: 5. Admin Dashboards & Analytics
item.description: Dashboard metrics summaries and analytics trend statistics from the Admin Service.

request.description: Returns enriched department dashboard list with pagination, search, status, and sorting filters.

item.name: 6. Settings & System Alerts
item.description: Manage central configuration settings and smart alerting pipelines.

item.name: 7. Admin Staff & Role Management
item.description: Directories and configurations for user authorization modifiers.

item.name: 8. Leave Management Workflow
item.description: Leave requests submission and manager approvals operations.

item.name: 9. Wards, Units, & Bed Capacity
item.description: Clinics physical capacity bed allocation and unit controls.

item.name: 10. Compliance & Security Audit Logs
item.description: Query audit logs and track suspicious activity anomalies or system security grades.
